error_signature: NJS-518: cannot connect to Oracle Database
title: Oracle Database connection error due to incorrect instance configuration
symptom: When attempting to execute a SQL query in n8n with Oracle node, the error 'NJS-518: cannot connect to Oracle Database' is displayed.
root_cause: The error occurs because the database connection string provided in the n8n credentials includes the complete link with Server/Instance instead of just the Instance name. This misconfiguration prevents n8n from properly connecting to the Oracle Database.
fix_steps: Open the Oracle node credentials in n8n
Edit the database connection string to include only the Instance name
agent_instruction: Ensure the database connection string in the Oracle node credentials only specifies the Instance name.
